title: Vedaraniyam Heat Wave
lead: Vedaraniyam is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.43. The city's temperature has reached extreme levels, posing health risks.
body:
The current heat wave in Vedaraniyam has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly. 
 The temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 11.0 GG and zero Heating Degree Days (HDD). 
 High humidity at 81% and moderate wind at 10.4 km/h are exacerbating the situation.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
